name: swayLoop
purpose: Sanftes, endloses Wippen — kontinuierliches Hin-und-Her-Neigen um einen kleinen Winkel (compositor-guenstig, dekorativ).
template:
{{css target}} { animation: motion-swayLoop-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s ease-in-out infinite alternate; }
@keyframes motion-swayLoop-{{css id}} { from { transform: rotate(-{{css params.angle}}deg) } to { transform: rotate({{css params.angle}}deg) } }
